basic_details.job_title: IIT Gandhinagar Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online

age_limit.details: There is no specified age limit for this position. Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course or Graduate Degree in Professional course selected through National Eligibility Tests – CSIR-UG NET and GATE or National Level Examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER etc. MTech/ME or BTech/BE in Electronics/Electrical or Equivalent Engineering Stream.
qualification.details: Post Graduate Degree in Professional Course or Graduate Degree in Professional course selected through National Eligibility Tests – CSIR-UG NET and GATE or National Level Examinations conducted by Central Government Departments and their Agencies and Institutions such as DST, DBT, DAE, DOS, DRDO, MHRD, ICAR, ICMR, IIT, IISc, IISER etc. MTech/ME or BTech/BE in Electronics/Electrical or Equivalent Engineering Stream. Proficiency with analog and mixed-signal IC design. Experience with circuit simulation tools like Cadence Virtuoso or equivalent. Familiarity with basic lab equipment like DMM and Oscilloscope. Experience with layout will be an added advantage.

salary_details.details: ₹46,990/- per month (including HRA of ₹9,990/- per month)

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 22-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Gandhinagar to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Gandhinagar JRF position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar is 22nd June 2026. Ensure your application is submitted well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a consolidated salary of ₹46,990/- per month, which includes House Rent Allowance (HRA) of ₹9,990/- per month.

faq.question: Q3. What are the essential qualifications required for this JRF role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Post Graduate Degree or Graduate Degree in a Professional Course, selected through national eligibility tests like CSIR-UG NET and GATE. A BTech/BE or MTech/ME in Electronics/Electrical or an equivalent engineering stream is also required.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: As per the provided information, no application fee is mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q5. What is the nature of the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Gandhinagar is a temporary role, indicating it is likely project-based or for a fixed tenure.

faq.question: Q6. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Junior Research Fellow (JRF) position announced by IIT Gandhinagar in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q7. What specific experience is preferred for this role?
faq.answer: Proficiency in analog and mixed-signal IC design, experience with circuit simulation tools like Cadence Virtuoso, and familiarity with basic lab equipment are preferred. Experience with layout is considered an added advantage.

faq.question: Q8. How can I apply for the IIT Gandhinagar JRF position?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted online. You can use the provided Google Form link or visit the official IIT Gandhinagar website to fill out the application form.

faq.question: Q9. Does IIT Gandhinagar offer age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: The provided data indicates "N/A" for the age limit summary, but typically government recruitment includes age relaxation for reserved categories as per rules. It is advisable to check the official notification for specifics.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF link is usually provided in the "Important Links" section of recruitment articles. You can also find it on the official website of IIT Gandhinagar.
